entities.name: RYE
entities.description: The primary crop studied, Secale cereale L.

entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: Crop used for EST primer pairs and map position comparison

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Markers used for discovery, frequency analysis, and genome mapping in rye

entities.name: INDEL
entities.description: Insertion-deletion markers identified in the rye transcriptome

entities.name: EXPRESSED SEQUENCE TAG
entities.description: Sequence tags used as primer pairs to amplify DNA

entities.name: CLEAVED AMPLIFIED POLYMORPHIC SEQUENCE
entities.description: A format used to convert SNPs to improve assay cost-effectiveness

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: Genomic markers used to compare genetic diversity data

entities.name: EST-DERIVED SSR
entities.description: SSR markers derived from expressed sequence tags used for diversity comparison

entities.name: GENOME MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the location of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: EXPECTED HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic variation within a population

entities.name: NUCLEOTIDE DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the degree of polymorphism within a population

entities.name: RYE TRANSCRIPTOME
entities.description: The complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome of rye

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES 1R-7R
entities.description: The specific genomic locations in rye where SNP loci were mapped
